name: flow-nondeterminism-fail
description: Tier 2: a flow records step 1 under one step key, crashes, and on resume runs a differently-keyed step at seq 1. With on_nondeterminism=fail the replay halts with KEEL-E031, naming the expected vs. observed step, and the divergent effect is never invoked. Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
